GenAiPlugin.description: Always evaluate free‑text post‑visit dictation first; decides whether to route to Post‑Visit Agentforce Debrief or Inquiry Flag

genAiPluginInstructions.description: ROUTING LOGIC (text only): - If the input explicitly says 'open/submit/create inquiry/MI/med info' → return: Inquiry Flag - Else if the input contains ≥2 distinct elements (e.g., trend + literature request, question + next steps) → return: Post‑Visit Agentforce Debrief - Else ask: 'File an Inquiry, or generate a Post‑Visit Debrief (Insight + Inquiry + Follow‑up + Reminder)?' Return only one of these strings: 'Post‑Visit Agentforce Debrief' | 'Inquiry Flag'

GenAiPlugin.scope: ✅ In scope • Any post‑visit, messy free‑text dictation about a single HCP visit • Mentions of trends + literature requests + follow‑ups ❌ Out of scope • Explicit commands to open/submit an Inquiry (route directly to Inquiry Flag)
